description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of sandals from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this sandal makes for a fabulous addition to your casual wardrobe. Upper Soft and wide leather midfoot straps in a cross-over pattern Backfoot strap has an adjustable velcro closure to offer a custom Fit Ergonomically padded leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with modified leaf rib-styled lugs strategically placed on the forefoot and heel to offer absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
